item.title: What Trump Wants From Cuba
item.description: A conversation with Vivian Salama about who stands to gain if America overhauls the island’s leadership
item.dc:creator: Will Gottsegen

item.title: The Worst Possible Moment to Rethink Your Relationship
item.description: InThe Drama, a couple is forced to question how well they know each other—just as they’re about to get married.
item.dc:creator: David Sims

item.title: Today’sAtlanticTrivia: The Sea
item.description: Test your knowledge—and read our stories for a little extra help.
item.dc:creator: Drew Goins

item.title: Unconventional Novels About Conventional People
item.description: In some great books, readers watch a character become disillusioned with their dreams of joyful conformity.
item.dc:creator: Boris Kachka

item.title: Silicon Valley Is in a Frenzy Over Bots That Build Themselves
item.description: How close are we really to self-improving AI?
item.dc:creator: Matteo Wong

item.title: Trump’s Stone Age Threat Will Lead to Tragedy
item.description: America and Iran are playing different games.
item.dc:creator: Graeme Wood

item.title: Is AI Going to Turn Us All Into Middle Managers?
item.description: What AI is actually doing to the workforce
item.dc:creator: Charlie Warzel

item.title: The Epstein Spectrum
item.description: A moral exercise in a moral desert
item.dc:creator: Josh Tyrangiel

item.title: Photos of the Week: Holy Week, ‘No Kings,’ Guitar Farm
item.description: Office-chair racing in Japan, an orca swimming near Seattle, a sandstorm over the island of Santorini, the launch of NASA’s newest lunar mission, and much more
item.dc:creator: Alan Taylor

item.title: Everyone Thinks They Need a NeeDoh
item.description: But no one can find one.
item.dc:creator: Olga Khazan

item.title: An Astonishing Concept Album Made Even Better
item.description: Lily Allen’sWest End Girltour isn’t a live concert so much as epic theater.
item.dc:creator: Sophie Gilbert

item.title: Hegseth’s War on America’s Military
item.description: Someone needs to explain the Pentagon purges to the American people.
item.dc:creator: Tom Nichols

item.title: An Army Shake-Up in the Middle of a War
item.description: A general is ousted and the Army secretary is in jeopardy, sources say.
item.dc:creator: Missy Ryan

item.title: Trump’s Purge May Be Just Beginning
item.description: After Pam Bondi’s ouster, other top administration officials could be in jeopardy.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Parker

item.title: The Next Attorney General Has an Impossible Job
item.description: Just like the last one
item.dc:creator: Quinta Jurecic

item.title: AtlanticTrivia for April 2, 2026: Missions to the Moon
item.description: Test your knowledge—and read our stories for a little extra help.
item.dc:creator: Drew Goins

item.title: Rachel Carson Has Known the Ocean
item.description: Her journey to the hidden depths of the sea invites a new way of seeing.
item.dc:creator: Jake Lundberg

item.title: Pam Bondi Couldn’t Possibly Succeed
item.description: She did what Donald Trump wanted her to do. That turned out to be part of the problem.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Chait

item.title: Twilight of the ‘Cougar’
item.description: Recent depictions of May-December relationships are challenging cliché notions about women who date younger men.
item.dc:creator: Anna Holmes

item.title: Don’t Mess With the Housewives of Ukraine
item.description: My interview with a tank maker provoked fury and memes—including from Zelensky.
item.dc:creator: Simon Shuster
